signals.headline: Wrapped XRP (wXRP) is now live on Solana's ecosystem**, enabling XRP holders to access Solana's decentralized finance in
signals.raw: Wrapped XRP (wXRP) is now live on Solana's ecosystem**, enabling XRP holders to access Solana's decentralized finance infrastructure without selling their tokens.[4] The integration represents a **$100 million cross-chain connection** between two of crypto's largest ecosystems and is backed by institutional-grade custody with one-to-one native XRP backing.[4]
